case_title: WALID MANDO VS. PEDRO ROLDAN MERIDA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANDO, WALID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERIDA, PEDRO ROLDAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WALID MANDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PEDRO ROLDAN MERIDA IS PRESENT.
